Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Curlee Bishop's Motion to Vacate Order Dismissing Entire Action issued on 1/19/2012 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal Order is vacated. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for an Arbitration Order to Show Cause on 7/13/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 6/29/2012. Proceedings not reported. (610)
